item.title: Starting in Bug Bounty: The Overwhelming Journey to My Underwhelming First Bug
item.description: This year I set a goal for myself to buckle down on bug bounty and find a valid bug. TL;DR - I did meet my goal (sort of) and as the title says - it’s underwhelming… but I’m more motivated now than ever and I hope this motivates you as well if you’re new to bug bounty! Disclaimer: This isn’t advice on what to do, per se, or “how to be successful” in bug bounty - there are many opinions about those things.

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Welcome to my blog! I’ll be posting content here that corresponds to my YouTube channel where I think it would be beneficial, as well as cybersecurity topics that I find interesting. I hope you’ll find the content here and on my channel useful! -ghsinfosec
